name: Fast Chicken Fricassee
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop onion and sauté in butter; add meat and fry until it is all around "white". Season with salt and pepper to taste; simmer for about 10 minutes. Add the mushrooms and simmer another 5 minutes.
2. Mix the cream and cornstarch together, then stir into the meat. Simmer, stirring occasionally.
3. When the meat is done, add the wine. Serve with rice. Instead of a meat dish, this can be made with mussels, Veal, Fish, or Crabs.
